modules.moduleDescription: RECON PROBE: Deployed probes can make the player and allies Masked. Recon Probe Max. Placement Range +10%, Recon Probe Duration -5%

MK19 AUTO-TURRET Destroying an enemy's tracks applies a track repair penalty and makes them Traced. MK19 Auto Turret Cooldown -5%, MK19 Auto Turret Energy Cost -5%, MK19 Auto Turret Range +10%, MK19 Auto Turret Explosion Damage Minimum -10%, MK19 Auto Turret Explosion Damage Maximum -10%

ZEALOUS: Replaces the vehicle's original shells with HE shells and its original loader with a single shot loader. Grants Zealous on destroying enemy tracks. Reload time 5s, Turret traverse speed +9.6%

HYPERDYNAMICS: Grants Hyperdynamics at 72 km/h and Minor Zealous at 85 km/h. Both effects can be active simultaneously. Vehicle Lateral Friction -15%, Engine power +12%, Hull traverse +10%, Boost Mode Energy Cost +25%
THERMAL VISION: Allows the vehicle to use thermal vision. Enemy Visibility Share Duration +19%
Boost mode Energy volume +10.5%, Boost mode regeneration rate +11%

equipments.equipmentDescription: Instantly restores HP and shields. Restores 550 HP instantly. Triggers shield recovery on activation. Taking damage interrupts the repair process. Cooldown: 45s. Charges: 3. Charge cooldown: 15s.
Temporarily grants the vehicle extra HP that depletes over time. Grants 700 temporary HP on activation. After 1s, temporary HP starts to deplete at 25 HP/s. Cooldown: 105s

perks.perkDescription: +100% to track HP and +50% to Slow resistance while drifting.
-5% to main gun reload time for each ability on cooldown.
+0.5 Ultimate Energy per second while boosting.
+25% to damage dealt by Lights Out explosions.

modules.moduleDescription: RECON PROBE: Deployed probes can make the player and allies Masked. Recon Probe Max. Placement Range +10%, Recon Probe Duration -5%
MK19 Auto Turret explosion damage (minimum) +54%, MK19 Auto Turret explosion damage (maximum) +54%
THERMAL VISION Allows the vehicle to use thermal vision. Moving Noise Data -24%
Boost mode Energy volume +10.5%, Boost mode regeneration rate +11%

equipments.equipmentDescription: Instantly restores HP and shields. Restores 550 HP instantly. Triggers shield recovery on activation. Taking damage interrupts the repair process. Cooldown: 45s. Charges: 3. Charge cooldown: 15s.
Temporarily grants the vehicle extra HP that depletes over time. Grants 700 temporary HP on activation. After 1s, temporary HP starts to deplete at 25 HP/s. Cooldown: 105s

perks.perkDescription: +0.5 Ultimate Energy per second while boosting.
+20% to Lights Out EMP radius and -50% to the explosion damage it deals to your vehicle.
-5% to main gun reload time for each ability on cooldown.
